notes: Cases are for Traffic-R interface validation, not for supervised-label accuracy.
A passing response must contain parsedFromModel=true, non-empty rawOutput, and a phaseCode in validPhaseCodes.
Derived cases reuse real road and intersection ids but modify queue/vehicle counts to probe output sensitivity.
